# Runtime Feature Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_compatibility_docs.py from docs/runtime-conformance.yml. -->

This matrix describes the checked runtime contract for native Sidemantic projects. A capability
status is meaningful only within the lifecycle and scope of its runtime.

## Runtime lifecycle

| Runtime | Lifecycle | Scope |
|---|---|---|
| Python | Stable | Canonical import, migration, orchestration, and full semantic-query runtime. |
| Rust native runtime | Experimental | Native format runtime; not an external-format compatibility layer. |
| DuckDB extension | Experimental | DuckDB-native wrapper around selected sidemantic-rs contracts. |
| WASM | Experimental | Browser-safe sidemantic-rs subset; not the Python/Pyodide product surface. |

Rust, DuckDB extension, and WASM surfaces are experimental even where an individual
capability is fixture-backed. `Supported` does not promote an experimental runtime to stable.

## Capability support

| Capability | Python | Rust native runtime | DuckDB extension | WASM |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Shared native YAML/SQL fixture contract | Supported | Supported | Partial — Dedicated extension cases, not the complete shared manifest. | Partial — Curated parity subset, not the complete shared manifest. |
| Native YAML load | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported |
| Native SQL and frontmatter definitions | Supported | Supported | Partial | Partial |
| Structured metric/dimension query compilation | Supported | Supported | Partial | Partial |
| Semantic SQL rewrite | Supported | Partial — Native subset; Python remains the full rewrite implementation. | Partial | Partial |
| Relationships, composite keys, and multi-hop joins | Supported | Supported | Partial | Partial |
| Cumulative, comparison, conversion, retention, and cohort metrics | Supported | Supported | Unsupported | Partial |
| Pre-aggregation routing | Supported | Supported | Unsupported | Partial |
| DuckDB query execution | Supported | Supported | Supported | Unsupported |
| External format import and migration | Supported | Unsupported | Unsupported | Unsupported |
| Python semantic definition files | Supported | Unsupported | Unsupported | Unsupported |
| HTTP, PostgreSQL wire, MCP, notebook, and widget surfaces | Supported | Partial — Experimental native HTTP/MCP binaries; no Python widget/notebook parity. | Unsupported | Unsupported |

## Evidence

### Shared native YAML/SQL fixture contract

- Python: status: `supported`; evidence: [`tests/native_compat/test_basic_model_fixture.py`](../tests/native_compat/test_basic_model_fixture.py); fixtures: `all` shared fixtures.
- Rust native runtime: status: `supported`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/native_fixtures.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/native_fixtures.rs); fixtures: `all` shared fixtures.
- DuckDB extension: status: `partial`; evidence: [`sidemantic-duckdb/test/sql/sidemantic_native_contract.test`](../sidemantic-duckdb/test/sql/sidemantic_native_contract.test).
- WASM: status: `partial`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/wasm_parity_subset.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/wasm_parity_subset.rs).

### Native YAML load

- Python: status: `supported`; evidence: [`tests/native_compat/test_basic_model_fixture.py`](../tests/native_compat/test_basic_model_fixture.py); fixtures: `basic_model`.
- Rust native runtime: status: `supported`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/native_fixtures.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/native_fixtures.rs); fixtures: `basic_model`.
- DuckDB extension: status: `supported`; evidence: [`sidemantic-duckdb/test/sql/sidemantic_native_contract.test`](../sidemantic-duckdb/test/sql/sidemantic_native_contract.test).
- WASM: status: `supported`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/wasm_parity_subset.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/wasm_parity_subset.rs).

- Rust native runtime: status: `supported`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/native_fixtures.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/native_fixtures.rs); fixtures: `native_sql_definitions`, `sql_frontmatter_definitions`, `compact_sql_model`.
- DuckDB extension: status: `partial`; evidence: [`sidemantic-duckdb/test/sql/sidemantic_native_contract.test`](../sidemantic-duckdb/test/sql/sidemantic_native_contract.test).
- WASM: status: `partial`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/wasm_parity_subset.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/wasm_parity_subset.rs).

- Python: status: `supported`; evidence: [`tests/native_compat/test_basic_model_fixture.py`](../tests/native_compat/test_basic_model_fixture.py); fixtures: `all_valid` shared fixtures.

- Rust native runtime: status: `supported`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/adbc_duckdb_e2e.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/adbc_duckdb_e2e.rs).

### External format import and migration

### HTTP, PostgreSQL wire, MCP, notebook, and widget surfaces

- Python: status: `supported`; evidence: [`tests/server/test_api_server.py`](../tests/server/test_api_server.py), [`tests/server/test_connection.py`](../tests/server/test_connection.py), [`tests/widget/test_widget_examples.py`](../tests/widget/test_widget_examples.py).
- Rust native runtime: status: `partial`; evidence: [`sidemantic-rs/tests/http_server.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/http_server.rs), [`sidemantic-rs/tests/mcp_protocol.rs`](../sidemantic-rs/tests/mcp_protocol.rs).
- DuckDB extension: status: `unsupported`.
- WASM: status: `unsupported`.

## Status definitions

- `supported`: Implemented on this runtime surface and backed by the listed automated evidence.
- `partial`: Some shapes are implemented, but callers must not assume full Python-runtime behavior.
- `unsupported`: Not part of this runtime surface.

Python/Pyodide is documented separately in [`pyodide.md`](pyodide.md). It runs the Python core
surface in a browser and must not be conflated with the experimental Rust/WASM runtime above.
